title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
originalTitle: 오늘 밤, 세계에서 이 사랑이 사라진다 해도
posterAlt: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?
synopsis: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight (2025) is a romance, drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
